text: you know what would happen if all humans
suddenly disappeared from the planet
after about 1 week all of the lights
would turn off because no one was there
to man the power grids after about 2
weeks all of the house pets still
trapped inside would pass away due to
dehydration or starvation while the rest
took to the streets and search for food
after 1 month all the nuclear power
plants would become unstable leading to
nuclear meltdowns across the entire
planet after about 1 year any City not
affected by nuclear fallout would be
completely reclaimed by Mother Nature
and all of the satellites would start to
fall back down to earth after 200 years
all of our largest buildings and
structures would begin to collapse
within 35,000 years the plant cycle
removes all traces of lead left from the
Industrial Revolution from Earth's soil
65,000 years after that CO2 levels in
our atmosphere return to prehuman levels
Mount Rushmore survives for 7.2 million
years before finally caving in and the
last traces of humanity will be our
Bronze Statues and cities buried
underground like some sort of techn
fossil
